name_cn:
Available in Tweed
DIOR caro vanity Small Vanity Case
Handheld and crossbody are standard for this series
Honestly not very novel or special, released every year
But only this one has a small mirror inside
Convenient for touch-ups on the go! So thoughtful!!
Oval shape, small and cute, playful when worn
Three materials available: Monogram/Leather/Tweed
Satisfies different needs
16.5×8×9.5cm,#8201m98
